messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'rulebookEvent'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. You can also replace multiple useState variables with useReducer if 'setIsSectionInteractive' needs the current value of 'rulebookEvent'.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [progress, isMobile, selectedEvent, rulebookEvent]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'rulebookEvent'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [rulebookEvent, selectedEvent]

Error: Cannot call impure function during render

`Math.random` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent).

  914 |                                     left: `${Math.random() * 100}%`,

React Hook useEffect has an unnecessary dependency: 'DEPARTMENTS.length'. Either exclude it or remove the dependency array. Outer scope values like 'DEPARTMENTS.length' aren't valid dependencies because mutating them doesn't re-render the component.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [activeIndex, smoothRotateY, scrollRotateY]
